offer: For logistics carriers processing 50–100 shipments/week, inefficient route planning causes increased operational costs. We generate weekly logistics route efficiency reports from GPS data instead of manual route planning and analysis.
problem: Inefficient route planning leads to increased operational costs.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for logistics carriers
Engage in Indie Hackers discussions on logistics
DM outreach to logistics carriers with demo video
Participate in community forums for logistics tools
try_it: Let users try Weekly report generation and User-friendly dashboard for operations managers on 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: 1-page landing page with the one-liner and CTA
Short demo video showing the manual-first workflow
Collect 10 short interviews from target users
Offer early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Post a weekly progress update in a relevant community
automation_simplification_ideas: One-click export of a simple report
